description: Update 6 plugin icons from all-black Simple Icons to their official brand colors: shortcut (#58B1E4), tripadvisor (#34E0A1), tumblr (#36465D), webflow (#146EF5), youtube-music (#FF0000), zendesk (#03363D).
qualityChecks: cd plugins/shortcut && npm run build && cd ../tripadvisor && npm run build && cd ../tumblr && npm run build && cd ../webflow && npm run build && cd ../youtube-music && npm run build && cd ../zendesk && npm run build

userStories.title: Update shortcut icon to brand color #58B1E4
userStories.description: Change the fill color in plugins/shortcut/icon.svg from black to the official Shortcut brand color #58B1E4.
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/shortcut/icon.svg contains fill="#58B1E4" instead of fill="black"
No other changes to the SVG structure or path data
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/shortcut/icon.svg (change fill color)

Context:
The icon is from Simple Icons and currently uses an all-black fill. The official Shortcut brand color from Simple Icons is #58B1E4.

Changes:
In plugins/shortcut/icon.svg, change `fill="black"` to `fill="#58B1E4"`. The current SVG content starts with:
```
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M24 6a6 6 0 0 0-6-6H6a5.975 5.975 0 0 0-4.242 1.758 5.998 5.998 0 0 0 0 8.484l2.137 2.137A6.007 6.007 0 0 0 0 18a6 6 0 0 0 6 6h12a5.975..." fill="black"/></svg>
```

Change only `fill="black"` to `fill="#58B1E4"` on the path element.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify the path data, viewBox, or any other SVG attributes
- Do NOT add width/height attributes
- Do NOT create or modify icon-dark.svg

userStories.title: Update tripadvisor icon to brand color #34E0A1
userStories.description: Change the fill color in plugins/tripadvisor/icon.svg from black to the official Tripadvisor brand color #34E0A1.
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/tripadvisor/icon.svg contains fill="#34E0A1" on the path element instead of fill="black"
No other changes to the SVG structure or path data
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/tripadvisor/icon.svg (change fill color)

Context:
The icon is from Simple Icons and currently uses fill="black" on the path element. The SVG element itself has fill="none". The official Tripadvisor brand color from Simple Icons is #34E0A1.

Changes:
In plugins/tripadvisor/icon.svg, change `fill="black"` to `fill="#34E0A1"` on the <path> element. The current SVG content starts with:
```
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M12.006 4.295c-2.67 0-5.338.784-7.645 2.353H0l1.963 2.135a5.997 5.997 0 0 0 4.04 10.43..." fill="black"/></svg>
```

Change only the path's `fill="black"` to `fill="#34E0A1"`. Keep `fill="none"` on the <svg> element unchanged.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify the path data, viewBox, or <svg> fill="none"
- Do NOT add width/height attributes
- Do NOT create or modify icon-dark.svg

```
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="black" d="M12 0C5.376 0 0 5.376 0 12s5.376 12 12 12 12-5.376 12-12S18.624 0 12 0zm0 19.104c-3.924 0-7.104-3.18-7.104-7.104S8.076 4.896 12 4.896s7.104 3.18 7.104 7.104-3.18 7.104-7.104 7.104zm0-13.332c-3.432 0-6.228 2.796-6.228 6.228S8.568 18.228 12 18.228s6.228-2.796 6.228-6.228S15.432 5.772 12 5.772zM9.684 15.54V8.46L15.816 12l-6.132 3.54z"/></svg>
```

- Do NOT add width/height attributes
